title: Experiences of Public Toilets 2023
description: The data consists of writings in which respondents describe their experiences of public toilets. Respondents have a disease, disability or other limitation affecting bowel function. The aim of the collection was, among other things, to raise awareness of the inequalities in access to public toilets and to reduce inequalities and prejudices related to defecation.
